cards.title: Drainage Maintenance Blitz
cards.description: Intensive inspection, inlet clearing, channel/debris removal, and urgent repairs to restore baseline capacity before storm season.

cards.title: Sandbag & Temporary Barrier Stockpile
cards.description: Pre-position sandbags and temporary barriers to divert floodwaters, recognizing labor intensity and potential interior drainage challenges.

cards.title: Early Warning & Risk Communication
cards.description: Implement integrated alert systems, multilingual communication, and coordinated public messaging to accelerate protective action.

cards.title: Pump Stations + Backup Power
cards.description: Construct or upgrade pump stations with redundancy and backup power systems to maintain drainage during extreme rainfall and grid outages.

cards.title: Detention / Underground Storage
cards.effects: Drainage Efficiency ↑↑↑; External Water Load ↓↓; Event Pacing ↓↓
cards.description: Construct detention basins, underground tanks, or storage tunnels to absorb and delay peak runoff during prolonged rainfall events.

cards.title: Levee / Floodwall Construction
cards.effects: Base Infrastructure Resilience ↑↑↑; External Water Load ↓↓↓
cards.description: Build structural perimeter protections to reduce surge and overbank flooding risk, acknowledging residual overtopping or failure risk.

cards.title: Critical Facility Utility Hardening
cards.description: Elevate and floodproof electrical and mechanical systems at hospitals, water plants, and other essential facilities to prevent cascading failures.

cards.title: Green Streets & Urban Trees
cards.description: Build structural perimeter protections to reduce surge and overbank flooding risk, acknowledging residual overtopping or failure risk.

cards.title: Higher Flood-Resistant Building Code Upgrade
cards.description: Adopt and enforce modern flood-resistant construction standards, including elevation requirements and strengthened structural provisions.

cards.title: EOP Annex: Evacuation + Shelter Ops
cards.description: Develop and exercise evacuation routes, shelter agreements, and continuity planning to reduce casualties and cascading disruptions.
